name: Rotini and Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package instructions; set aside.
2. Add the broccoli 5 minutes before the pasta is finished cooking. Cover the pot and return it to a boil for an additional 5 minutes. Drain and rinse under cold water, then set aside.
3. In a large skillet, heat the margarine and olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic, zucchini, and scallions; cook for 2 to 3 minutes until vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in crab meat and cook for another minute.
5. Add the cooked pasta and broccoli to the skillet. Mix well.
6. Sprinkle with 1 ounce of grated Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Garnish with remaining cheese before serving.
7. Makes 8 servings.
This dish is great hot (as a main dinner) or cold (as a salad). Leftovers are excellent for lunches.
Weight Watchers exchanges: 1.5 bread, 1.5 protein, 1.5 vegetable, 1 fat and 30 optional calories.
